title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · State Clinic: Checkpoint Restart
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops checkpoint restart increment in a fault-injected recovery harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
